sheets-nate.text: No public data in our set connects Nate Sheets's recorded background or positions specifically to property taxes or public school funding.
No public data in our set on Nate Sheets's recorded votes or stated positions regarding property taxes or public school funding.

tucker-clayton.text: On education, Clayton Tucker's recorded position: Tucker supports taxpayer-funded public education "through college," indicating strong backing for public-school funding rather than vouchers or charters.

caveats: We only show a connection to homeowner parent concerns when a candidate's own recorded background in our data set names it directly (for example, a farming or small-business background). Where no such record exists, we say so rather than guess at a candidate's likely position.
summary: For a homeowner parent voter looking at the Texas Commissioner of Agriculture race (Nate Sheets, Clayton Tucker): our data set does not contain candidate-specific positions or voting records on property taxes or public school funding for this race. Below is what we do have on each candidate's background and, where available, campaign finance.
